query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`artist` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`images` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`featured` int DEFAULT 0,
	`stock` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `cartItems` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `cartItems_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wishlistItems` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `wishlistItems_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `orders` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`items` json NOT NULL,
	`totalPrice` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','processing','shipped','delivered','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`shippingAddress` json NOT NULL,
	`paymentMethod` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'card',
	`paymentStatus` enum('pending','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `orders_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

INSERT INTO `products` (`title`, `artist`, `price`, `category`, `description`, `images`, `featured`, `stock`) VALUES
('Abstract Serenity', 'Elena Rodriguez', '2500.00', 'Paintings', 'A mesmerizing abstract piece capturing the essence of tranquility through bold brushstrokes and vibrant colors.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 1, 5),
('Ethereal Dreams', 'Marcus Chen', '3200.00', 'Paintings', 'Contemporary painting exploring the intersection of reality and imagination with layered textures.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 1, 3),
('Urban Pulse', 'Sofia Bergström', '1800.00', 'Photography', 'Stunning urban landscape capturing the energy of modern city life through innovative composition.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578321272176-b7bff2e4e5e7?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 1, 8),
('Timeless Form', 'David Okafor', '4500.00', 'Sculptures', 'Bronze sculpture representing the eternal nature of human connection and movement.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 1, 2),
('Digital Horizons', 'Alex Kumar', '1200.00', 'Digital', 'Cutting-edge digital art exploring the boundaries between technology and human emotion.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 10),
('Chromatic Waves', 'Isabella Rossi', '2800.00', 'Paintings', 'Oil painting featuring dynamic color waves that seem to flow across the canvas with movement.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 4),
('Midnight City', 'James Wilson', '1600.00', 'Photography', 'Atmospheric night photography capturing the solitude and beauty of urban environments.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 6),
('Sculptural Poetry', 'Amara Osei', '3800.00', 'Sculptures', 'Contemporary sculpture blending traditional techniques with modern aesthetics.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 3),
('Neon Reflections', 'Viktor Petrov', '2100.00', 'Digital', 'Digital artwork exploring neon aesthetics and retro-futuristic themes.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 7),
('Organic Geometry', 'Yuki Tanaka', '2400.00', 'Paintings', 'Acrylic painting combining organic forms with geometric precision.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 5),
('Luminous Paths', 'Carlos Mendez', '1900.00', 'Photography', 'Landscape photography capturing the interplay of light and shadow in natural environments.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 9),
('Kinetic Energy', 'Priya Sharma', '3100.00', 'Sculptures', 'Dynamic sculpture exploring movement and balance through innovative materials.', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop"]', 0, 2);
